2149990.name: Gems Defenders
2149990.description:
Match 3 Game meets Tower Defense and Story driven RPG! That's Gems Defenders.

Dive to the magical world of Aldenor and meet new Heroes! Heroes that are born out of necessity! Meet Inichen, the elven sorceress and Nande, human general of mighty army. But most importantly Lenatha - young elven druidess who can enchant powerful gems. Help them build Dylan and learn what happened to the brave settlers and explorers of the new world we call Aldenor!



  • 12 unique weapons
  • 18 spells
  • 20 unique enemies
  • 30+ hand designed levels
  • Two complex talent trees
  • Four different sentry turrets
  • Skins
  • Hats
  • Story written by book writer
  • Music tailored for the game by excellent musician.



And that's not everything!
Endless mode with post end game content and upgrades for anyone who wishes to continue playing further.
2149990.supported_languages: 英语, 捷克语, 斯洛伐克语
